title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ID Fresh Food - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ID Fresh Food - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
